name: SEO Backlink Live API  Flow PRD

parameters.content: ## Get Domain List and Pass to DataForSEO API
## Start LLM Process With Filter Prompt
## Get DataForSEO API Response and Check for error
## Get LLM data and create report and merge
## Get Merged LLM and Report data and create a backlink record with API

📊 N8N SEO – BACKLINK AUTOMATION WORKFLOW

🔹 PURPOSE  
Automates SEO BACKLINK research & reporting using DataForSEO API and LLM OpenRouter (OpenAI) SEO Agent filter prompt, with error checks, merges, and final report creation.

🔹 FLOW OVERVIEW  
1. START PROCESS → Fetch domains & prep data  
2. DataForSEO API Call → Give domains and Get Response  
3. SEO AGENT → Give API data to SEO agent with filter prompt and get response  
4. CREATE REPORT → Create report with agent response and merge with llm response
5. ERROR CHECKS → Catch/report failures at multiple stages  
6. CREATE BACKLINK → Create backlink with report data and llm response 
7. ERROR CHECKS → Catch/backlink failures at multiple stages

📌 Workflow Legend  

🟩 Get Domain List and Pass to DataForSEO API

- Get Domains List → Fetch all domains.  
- Process Domain and Filter Date → Prepare domains with last 24 hours time and format the data.
- DataForSEO API Call →  Fetch data from SEO API for domains. 

 
🟥 Get DataForSEO API Response and Check for error

- Check for API Error → Catch/DataForSEO API errors.  
- Log Error → Log any error if any in DataForSEO API.  
- Process DataForSEO Response → Process reponse and format .

  
🟩 Start LLM Process With Filter Prompt 
- SEO Agent → Pass the DataForSEO formated response to seo agent and get filtered resposne.  
- OpenAI Model → Branch on success/error.  



🟦 Get LLM data and create report and merge 
- Report data → Get seo agent filtered repsone and create a format for report.
- Create Report → HTTP call to create a report with report data.  
- Check for Report Error → Catch/report errors.  
- Merge Report and LLM Data → get create report reponse and llm filtered response.  


🟪 Get Merged LLM and Report data and create a backlink record with API  
- Backlink data  → get merge report and llm filtered response and format for backlink data.  
- Loop Over Backlink data → pass backlink to loop to process one by one .  
- Create Backlink → POST backlink data to API.  
- Check for Backlink Error → Catch/Backlink errors.  


⚠️ Token usage warning  
- OpenRouter reserves the FULL context window if no limits are set.  
- Always set `"max_tokens": 256–512` to avoid 32k token charges.  
- The `web` plugin pulls in full search results → huge input tokens.  
- Use the plugin only when fresh data is needed.

parameters.text:
=You are an SEO assistant. Use the following rules to evaluate and filter backlink data. You MUST return your response **only in JSON** format, with two sections:
- `"accepted"`: Backlinks that meet all criteria
- `"rejected"`: Backlinks that fail any rule, with a `reason` explaining why

Do NOT include any Markdown code fences, comments, or extra text.

--- SEO Filtering Rules (Summary) ---

🔹 Section A: Rank & Authority  
- Minimum domain rank: 30  
- High quality threshold: 40  
- Domain age: no limit  
- Backlink history: required (2019+)  
- Accept stable or growing link history  

🔹 Section B: Spam & Link Quality  
- Spam score must be under 10%  
- Reject spam score > 60%  
- Required: dofollow ratio ≥ 80%, status = 200, content type = text/html  
- Avoid red flags (5xx errors, unusual size, missing content type)  

🔹 Section C: Link Context  
- Anchor types allowed: branded, exact match, partial match, generic, naked  
- Max exact match anchor: 40%  
- Contextual placement only  
- Must match page topic  

🔹 Section D: Geo & TLD  
- Accept: USA, UK, UAE, AU  
- Preferred TLDs: .com, .org, .edu, .gov, .co.uk, .ae, .au  

🔹 Section E: Tiering  
Tier 1 (80–100): domain_rank ≥ 60, spam ≤ 5%, ref_domains ≥ 500

Tier 2 (60–79): domain_rank ≥ 45, spam ≤ 10%, ref_domains ≥ 300

Tier 3 (40–59): domain_rank ≥ 30, spam ≤ 20%, ref_domains ≥ 100

score must also be assigned (0–100) based on backlink quality signals (authority, spam, link history, context, geo). 

---

Now, evaluate the backlink JSON provided below. For each backlink, return in JSON format for acceped and reject:

"domain": "sample-accepted.com",
"url": "https://sample-accepted.com/page",
"score": [EVALUATED RANK 0-100 integer],
"tier": "evalutate the link and give it tier based on section E",
"fromDomain": "sample-accepted.com",
"fromUrl": "https://sample-accepted.com/page",
"anchor": "Best web development agency",
"rank": evalutate rnk based on backlink data,
"domainRank": 80,
"spamScore": 3,
"dofollow": true,
"isBroken": false,
"firstSeen": "2024-01-10 09:15:00 +00:00",
"lastSeen": "2025-08-15 14:20:00 +00:00",
"linkType": "anchor",
"pageTitle": "Top Web Development Agency – Sample Accepted",
"reason": "Passed all filters including authority, low spam 


📌 Output strictly in the following JSON format:
--- Output JSON Structure ---

{
  "domain": "example.com",
  "accepted": [
    {
      "domain": "sample-accepted.com",
      "url": "https://sample-accepted.com/page",
      "score": [CALCULATED SCORE 0-100],
      "tier": "[Tier 1/Tier 2/Tier 3 based on domain_rank/spam/ref_domains]",
      "fromDomain": "sample-accepted.com",
      "fromUrl": "https://sample-accepted.com/page",
      "anchor": "Best web development agency",
      "rank": 75,
      "domainRank": 80,
      "spamScore": 3,
      "dofollow": true,
      "isBroken": false,
      "firstSeen": "2024-01-10 09:15:00 +00:00",
      "lastSeen": "2025-08-15 14:20:00 +00:00",
      "linkType": "anchor",
      "pageTitle": "Top Web Development Agency – Sample Accepted",
      "reason": "Passed all filters including authority, low spam score, and correct geo."
    }
  ],
  "rejected": [
    {
      "domain": "sample-rejected.com",
      "url": "https://sample-rejected.com/spammy-page",
      "fromDomain": "sample-rejected.com",
      "score":[CALCULATED SCORE 0-100],
      "tier": "[Tier 1/Tier 2/Tier 3 based on domain_rank/spam/ref_domains]",
      "fromUrl": "https://sample-rejected.com/spammy-page",
      "anchor": "Cheap backlinks",
      "rank": 20,
      "domainRank": 25,
      "spamScore": 45,
      "dofollow": false,
      "isBroken": false,
      "firstSeen": "2024-02-05 11:00:00 +00:00",
      "lastSeen": "2025-06-22 18:45:00 +00:00",
      "linkType": "anchor",
      "pageTitle": "Buy 1000 Backlinks – Spammy Page",
      "reason": "Spam score too high (45%) and domain rank below minimum threshold."
    }
  ]
}


Please evaluate the following backlink JSON data and filter based on the SEO rules:

{{ JSON.stringify($json) }}
